x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Instruction System Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of a specific system or set of rules and/or processes to be applied at the settlement place. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Instructing Reimbursement Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies the agent through which the instructing agent will reimburse the instructed agent. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Instructed Reimbursement Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Agent at which the instructed agent will be reimbursed. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third Reimbursement Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies the branch of the instructed agent where the amount of money will be made available when different from the instructed reimbursement agent. (ISO20022)
